LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES. PLAINTIFF HAS NO CLAIM FOR GENERAL NEGLIGENCE. GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 815 AND THE UNDISPUTED FACTS DEMONSTRATE THIS IS NOT A DANGEROUS CONDITION OF PUBLIC PROPERTY. FIELDER V CITY OF GLENDALE (1977) 71 CAL APP 3D 719, 724 FN.4. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
